# Usman Khizar — usmankhizar.com
> Usman Khizar is an SEO specialist and GEO consultant. He helps brands rank on Google and get cited by AI assistants including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini through SEO, GEO, AEO, and parasite SEO strategies.

## Services
- Search Engine Optimisation (SEO)
- Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)
- Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO)
- Parasite SEO
- LinkedIn Growth
- Personal Brand Strategy

## Contact
